scripts.compare-exports:with-client-generation: npm run generate-client && npm run compare-exports
scripts.generate-client: cd ../../.. && docker run -it --rm -v ./clients/typescript:/clients/typescript -v ./backend/target/openapi:/backend/target/openapi openapitools/openapi-generator-cli:v7.7.0 docker-entrypoint.sh generate -i backend/target/openapi/openapi.json -g typescript-fetch -o clients/typescript/ -p=npmName=@dlr-shepard/shepard-client,npmRepository=bliblu/projects/blabla/packages/npm/,npmVersion=${VERSION_NUMBER},supportsES6=true,typescriptThreePlus=true
